programmes.show_description: When a woman turns her husband in for possessing child pornography, the case is complicated by a sudden death. Benson tries to reconnect with a victim she saved.
A brutal assault in the street leads Carisi to pursue hate crime charges. Benson must support a home-bound witness too scared to speak up.
A witness in a high-profile rape case is murdered in her apartment. Logan and Falacci find their investigation is blocked by an ambitious assistant district attorney.
Goren goes undercover to infiltrate a jail in which his nephew is incarcerated. The detective is desperate to save his nephew from an abusive prison regime.
A seasoned corporal gives some advice to a young man with a new motorcycle. A woman's impatience lands her in hot water when she's pulled over for tailgating.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
While in New York, Jessica helps out a struggling band, but things become complicated when the bassist's sister is implicated in the murder of a local extortionist.
A charity rock concert organised to save Maine Woods from developers is threatened when a singer is murdered. Can Jessica and the Sheriff catch the killer and salvage the event?
Jessica's friend Erin is haunted by being kidnapped as a child, and when Erin reads a novel with a story too close for coincidence, Jessica makes a shocking revelation.
Danny re-examines a case when a mother voices outrage over her son's unsolved murder. Eddie is shot while on duty. Erin and her ex-husband face off in court.
Danny and Baez race to find a girl who will die without her medication. Jamie and Eddie are on the wrong side of an investigation after engaging in a car chase.
Danny is forced to ask his incarcerated arch enemy for help when a convict escapes prison. Erin's plan to go on a date with her ex-husband creates friction between her and Anthony.
Frank goes head to head with a data-tracking company when they refuse to unlock the phone of a terrorist that may hold information regarding upcoming targets.
Danny and Baez investigate a series of drive-by shootings they think may be connected to six wrongly convicted men who were just released from prison.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
The team try to track down a group of robbers who stole 70 million dollars worth of gold bars in an armoured car heist.
Callen, Sam, Kensi and Deeks climb aboard an aircraft carrier to investigate the murder of a fellow NCIS Special Agent.
The team try to locate a former informant who has been kidnapped after uncovering a link between a car shipping outfit and a terrorist ring.
Callen and Sam investigate the death of a marine in Afghanistan. Nate Getz returns after being summoned by Hetty.
Callen goes undercover to infiltrate a network of Chechen terrorists trying to recruit foreign fighters to join their cause.
Crime drama. When the detectives probe the castration of a serial sex offender, they discover the culprit may have been one of the women he abused.
Drama series about sex crime investigation. The discovery of an injured toddler sends Stabler and Cragen on a search for the attacker, who may be a paedophile .
A teenager found unconscious in the park leads to a missing persons investigation. Benson must help Noah come to terms with the past when he questions the origins of his birth.
The squad is on edge as Carisi waits for a verdict in Maddie's kidnapping case. Benson tries to help the Flynn family pick up the pieces of their broken life.
Logan and Falacci are tasked with investigating a devastating shooting in a local park, in which three teenagers are shot.
While still on leave from the force, Goren decides to go on an undercover operation.
A woman makes a desperate attempt to frame her friend right in front of deputies. A driver's assortment of containers raises some questions.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Tony and Ziva travel to Colombia, where they are joined by Ziva's mentor to search for a missing Marine Lieutenant and Navy Chaplain.
The team investigate after a corpse and some classified documents are found in the burnt-out warehouse of a manufacturer.
The investigation into a fire on a ship leads to a revelation that threatens the security of the entire US fleet.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
A star basketball player is suspected of murdering a fan who harassed him. He pleads guilty to killing the man, but insists he was acting in self-defence.
Detectives investigate when an SUV hurtles into a downtown restaurant, killing its driver and injuring the sole passenger and several bystanders.
A high-powered television executive is murdered and Fontana and Green believe the murderer is the victim's jilted ex-lover.
Acid: Crime drama. Lieutenant Van Buren cuts corners when trying to track down the assailant who threw acid in the face of her friend's daughter (10/22).
Bible Story: American drama series about lawyers and police. A man is mysteriously killed after he desecrates a treasured edition of the Hebrew Torah in a synagogue (11/22).
Family Friend: US crime drama series. When a murdered accountant's mob connections are exposed, the detectives are drawn into the shady underbelly of the NYPD (12/22).
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
American crime drama. While the NCIS team investigates the link between a dead journalist and a Navy petty officer, Ziva is surprised by a rare visit from her father.
American crime drama. In the aftermath of an event that strikes close to home, the NCIS team unites to seek answers and demand justice.
Hit and Run: American crime drama. The NCIS team investigates a Marine's car accident and ignites some upsetting memories for Abby as a young girl on the trail of her first case.
NCIS probe a Navy lieutenant's death at a blood bank while McGee seeks team support for his twins' school fundraiser.
Drama series about an elite force based in New York. An escaped paedophile kidnaps his accuser and takes Detective Benson hostage.
Drama series about an elite force based in New York. Benson and Stabler investigate the death of a college student.
